metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4195
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Description in Figure 5 legend.
Fig. 5. "Electron micrographs showing trkB immunoreactivity over postsynaptic densities(PSDs). Anti-trkBout antisera were used. In (A) and other pan-els, curved arrows point to immunoreactive postsynaptic densities(PSDs) and open arrows point to unlabeled PSDs and arrowheads point to symmetric synaptic junctions. "
- "Peroxidase reaction product accumulated over PSDs of spines (Figs. 5A-D)."

19/01/2021 Dnyanada:
Figure 4: Western blot analysis using anti-trkBin reveals the full-length trkB and several minor bands in the PSD (Fig. 4A). The bands were abolished using antibodies preadsorbed with the peptide antigens (Fig.4B), indicating specificity of the immunoreaction.. Experimental description: Materials and Methods
Experimental Animals and Subcellular Fractions
Sprague-Dawley rats were used.
